review.note: AI-drafted first pass - SME review required before production

sources.title: The Great Depression in the USA - Grade 11
What was the Great Depression and why did it start in the USA?
Capitalism, communism, Marxism and revolution - Grade 11
SA experiences monetary crisis due to a heavy drain of gold from the country during the Great Depression

slides.title: IKapitalizimu e-USA 1900-1940
slides.lead: Indlela umnotho omkhulu wekapitalizimu wephasi owakhula ngamandla ngeminyaka yee-1920s, wawohloka ngo-1929, wabuye wakhiwa kabutjha yiNew Deal.

media.alt: Igirafu enomudwa okhuphukako besele wehla ngaphezu kwedorobha, otjengisa ukukhula nokuwohloka.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 320 180' role='img'><rect width='320' height='180' fill='#f4efe6'/><g fill='#c8b89a'><rect x='20' y='96' width='26' height='64'/><rect x='54' y='78' width='26' height='82'/><rect x='88' y='106' width='26' height='54'/><rect x='122' y='70' width='26' height='90'/></g><polyline points='20,140 70,120 120,86 170,50 210,66 250,120 300,150' fill='none' stroke='#8a1f1f' stroke-width='5' stroke-linecap='round' stroke-linejoin='round'/><circle cx='170' cy='50' r='6' fill='#e8a13a'/><rect y='160' width='320' height='20' fill='#7a8b5a'/></svg>

slides.notes: Yethula isahluko njengesifundo esitjhejwako sekapitalizimu njengehlelo lomnotho: indlela eveza ukukhula okurhabako, kubayini ingawohloka, nendlela abarhulumende abasabela ngayo. Iintambo eembili zithi (1) ukukhula kwemakethe ekhululekileko yeminyaka yee-1920s neenzobelezo zayo, (2) ukuwohloka kwango-1929 nesabelo seNew Deal kaRoosevelt. Yembula bona umlando lo bewuhlobene neSewula Afrika ngegolide nangokurhweba kwephasi.

slides.title: Yini ikapitalizimu?
slides.lead: Ihlelo lomnotho elakhiwe ngokuba nefuyo yangasese, ipumelelo nokuphalisana kwemakethe.

blocks.text: Ngaphasi **kwekapitalizimu**, amabhizinisi nefuyo kubulungwa babantu bangasese, ingasi murhulumende. Abanikazi batjala imali (**ikhephithali**) bona benze iimphahla namkha iinsetjenziswa, bazithengise ngenzuzo (**ipumelelo**), begodu batjale godu ukwenzela bona bakhule. Amanani abekwa **kukudingeka nokutholakala** kwemphahla emakethe ephalisanako.

items: **I-laissez-faire** (ukungangeneleli): ikholelo yokobana urhulumende akufuze angenelele emnothweni.
**Imakethe ekhululekileko**: abathengi nabathengisi benza iinqunto zabo ngaphandle komthetho omninengi.
**Amasheya nemakethe yamasheya**: abantu bathenga iincenyana ezincani zekhamphani, banethemba lokobana ivele iyakhula.

slides.notes: Chaza amabizo ngokunembileko ngombana isahluko soke sisebenzisa wona njalo. Vezelela umahluko phakathi kwekapitalizimu nekhomunizimu (ukubulungwa mrhulumende, ihlelo eliyingaphakathi) abafundi abazokuhlangana nayo esihlokweni seRashiya. Gandelela bona ngeminyaka yee-1920s e-USA umgomo obungamele bewuyi-laissez-faire: aborhulumende beRiphabligi bebakholelwa bona imakethe izozilawula ngokwayo - umbono i-Depression eyawugwaya ngokukhamba kwesikhathi.

slides.title: Ukukhula kwekapitalizimu yemakghwa
slides.lead: Ngo-1900 i-USA yaba mnotho wemakghwa odumileko ephasini.

blocks.text: Iimtlhako yemvelo enonileko, isibalo sabantu esikhulako esondliwa ku-immigration, netheknoloji etjha kwenza i-USA yaba yisikghula semakghwa. Amabhizinisi amakhulu (**big businesses**) nemonopoli - kwenkulungwana, ipetroli neendlela zesitimela - bebalawula amabubulo woke begodu benza inengi elincani labanikazi banjinga khulu.

items: **Ukwenza iimphahla ngobunengi**: umudwa okhambako wokuhlanganisa kaHenry Ford (ukusukela ngo-1913) wenza iimphahla zabatjhipha begodu zakhiqizwa msinya.
Ikoloyi kaFord i-Model T yenza ukukhwela imitjhini kufinyeleleke emindenini evamileko.
Amarhola aphakemeko kwezinye iinkghwari, njengelanga likaFord le-$5, kwasiza abasebenzi bona nabo babe bathengi.

media.alt: Umudwa wokuhlanganisa efeketri onomzimba wekoloyi okhamba phakathi kwabasebenzi.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 160' role='img'><rect width='240' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect x='16' y='30' width='208' height='60' fill='#dcd3c2'/><rect x='24' y='110' width='192' height='10' fill='#8a1f1f'/><g fill='#2f5233'><rect x='40' y='120' width='40' height='16' rx='4'/><rect x='100' y='120' width='40' height='16' rx='4'/><rect x='160' y='120' width='40' height='16' rx='4'/></g><g fill='#7a5a3a'><circle cx='36' cy='104' r='7'/><circle cx='96' cy='104' r='7'/><circle cx='156' cy='104' r='7'/></g><rect x='30' y='46' width='40' height='28' fill='#c8b89a'/><rect x='90' y='46' width='40' height='28' fill='#c8b89a'/><rect x='150' y='46' width='40' height='28' fill='#c8b89a'/></svg>

slides.notes: Chaza ukuqakatheka kokwenza iimphahla ngobunengi: umudwa wokuhlanganisa wahlukanisa umsebenzi waba yimisebenzana elula ephindaphindwako, kwehlisa iindleko khulu. Lokhu kwehlisa amanani, kwakhulisa umkhiqizo, begodu ku-Ford, kwabhadela amarhola aphakemeko okwenza abasebenzi bakwazi ukuthenga iimphahla abazenzako - ijikelezo elihle lokuthenga elisenhloko yokunjinga kweminyaka yee-1920s. Tjheja ihlangothi elilinye: imonopoli yahlanganisa ubunjinga namandla.

slides.title: Ukukhula komnotho kweminyaka yee-1920s
slides.lead: Ngemva kwePi yePhasi yokuThoma i-USA yathabela isikhathi seminyaka elitjhumi sokukhula okurhabako nokutjala imali okukhuphukako kwabathengi.

blocks.text: Iminyaka yee-1920s yaziwa ngokobana ma-**Roaring Twenties**. Iimfeketri zathulula iinkoloyi, amarediyo, iimtjhini yamandwebo, ii-fridge nezinye iimphahla zabathengi. I-Advertising nesikweledu esilula (**ihire purchase**, namkha 'thenga nje, ubhadele ngokukhamba kwesikhathi') kwakhuthaza abantu bona bathenge, ngesikhathi iinema, ijazz neenfetjheni ezitjha kwatjhentjha isiko lomango.

items: Ukuba nekoloyi kwakhula khulu, kwakhulisa insimbi, irabha, iglazi, ipetroli nokwakhiwa kweendlela.
Iimphahla zegezi ne-advertising ehlangeneko kwadala umphakathi wabathengi wamva.
Aborhulumende beRiphabligi bagcina imithelo iphasi, banciphisa umthetho begodu bakhuphula imithelo yeempahla ezingenako (tariffs).

media.alt: Irediyo, ikoloyi nesibani okutjengisa iimphahla zabathengi zeminyaka yee-1920s.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 160' role='img'><rect width='240' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect x='24' y='60' width='54' height='48' rx='6' fill='#7a5a3a'/><circle cx='51' cy='84' r='12' fill='#dcd3c2'/><rect x='38' y='100' width='26' height='4' fill='#f4efe6'/><g fill='#2f5233'><rect x='96' y='78' width='60' height='20' rx='6'/><rect x='108' y='66' width='34' height='16' rx='5'/></g><circle cx='108' cy='100' r='8' fill='#3a3a3a'/><circle cx='146' cy='100' r='8' fill='#3a3a3a'/><circle cx='198' cy='72' r='18' fill='#e8a13a'/><rect x='192' y='90' width='12' height='12' fill='#c8b89a'/></svg>

slides.notes: Yenza ukukhula lokhu kuphile ngeemininingwana yomango, kodwana gcina intambo yokuhlaziya: ukunjinga bekusekelwe kuthengeni okuhlangeneko okususwa sikweledu. Buza abafundi bona yini engonakala nengabe abantu bebeboleka khulu ukuthenga iimphahla. Tjheja bona ukukhula bekukhona kodwana kwakhelwe eenzobelezweni ezithileko - iphuzu iisilayidi ezilandelako ezizolikhulisa. Imithelo ephakemeko yeempahla ezingenako (isb. i-Fordney-McCumber, 1922) yavikela imakghwa ye-US kodwana yalimaza ukurhweba kwephasi.

slides.title: Kubayini umnotho wakhula?
slides.lead: Amandla amanengi ahlangana bona atjhukumise ukukhula kweminyaka yee-1920s.

blocks.heading: Ukwenza ngobunengi
blocks.text: Imidwa yokuhlanganisa yehlisa iindleko yathulula emakethe iimphahla ezitjhipha, ezifiswako.

blocks.heading: Isikweledu esilula
blocks.text: I-hire purchase yavumela abantu abavamileko bona bathenge iimphahla ezidurako ngokubhadela ngeengcenye.

blocks.heading: Ithemba nomgomo
blocks.text: Imithelo ephasi, umthetho omncani nokukhuphuka kwamanani wamasheya kwakhuthaza ukuthenga nokutjala imali.

slides.notes: Sebenzisa amakarada la amathathu njengesakhelo sokuhlaziya kunokobana kube yihlelo lokufunda ngehloko. Sunduzela abafundi bona babone iinhlobano: ukwenza ngobunengi kutlhoga ukuthenga okuhlangeneko; ukuthenga okuhlangeneko bekusekelwe sikweledu nethemba. Nakuwohloka ithemba ngo-1929, ngayinye yamandla la ingaba yizobelezo. Lokhu kubeka phambili iimbangela ze-Depression.

slides.title: Ukuqagela emakethe yamasheya
slides.lead: Amanani wamasheya akhuphukako alinga iingidi bona zibhejele emasheyeni - kanengi ngemali ebolekiweko.

blocks.text: Njengombana amanani wamasheya bekaragela phambili nokukhuphuka, abantu abavamileko barhaba ukutjala imali, banethemba lokuthengisa ngokukhamba kwesikhathi ngenzuzo - umkghwa obizwa ngokobana ku**kuqagela** (speculation). Abanengi bathenga amasheya 'nge-**margin**', babhadela incenyana encani yentengo baboleka esele. Lokhu bekusebenza nakukhuphuka amanani, kodwana bekutjho bona imakethe yakhelwe entabeni yesikweledu.

items: Amanani wamasheya akhuphuka msinya khulu kuneentengo zangempela zamakhamphani.
Ukuthenga nge-margin bekutjho bona ukwehla okuncani kwentengo kungamqeda umtjali-mali.
Ngo-1929 imakethe yaba etjhisako ngendlela eyingozi - iqumbi lokuqagela (speculative bubble).

media.alt: Umudwa wamasheya okhuphuka ngokutjhisako onequmbi lesiyeleliso ngaphezulu.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 160' role='img'><rect width='240' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><line x1='30' y1='20' x2='30' y2='134' stroke='#333' stroke-width='2'/><line x1='30' y1='134' x2='214' y2='134' stroke='#333' stroke-width='2'/><polyline points='40,124 80,110 120,90 160,58 196,28' fill='none' stroke='#8a1f1f' stroke-width='5' stroke-linecap='round' stroke-linejoin='round'/><circle cx='196' cy='28' r='16' fill='#e8a13a' opacity='0.85'/><text x='196' y='33' font-size='16' text-anchor='middle' fill='#5c1414' font-family='sans-serif'>!</text></svg>

slides.notes: Chaza umkghwa wequmbi ngokukhanyako: amanani ehlukana neenzuzo zangempela zamakhamphani ngombana woke umuntu bekacabanga bona azoragela phambili nokukhuphuka. Ukuthenga nge-margin kwandisa kokubili ukuzuza nokulahlekelwa. Lokhu kuyizobelezo yakade yekapitalizimu engalawulwako begodu kuyimbangela eyihloko yokuwohloka. Buza: kwenzekani kwabathengi be-margin nakwehla masinyana amanani?

slides.title: Abaphumeleleko nabalahlekelweko yokukhula
slides.lead: Ukukhula kweminyaka yee-1920s kwafihla ukungalingani okukhulu neenzobelezo ngaphasi kobuso.

items: Abanikazi bamabubulo amakhulu nabaneesheya.
Abasebenzi abanekghono bemadorobheni emabubulweni amatjha.
Isigaba esiphakathi somango esikhulako.
Abalimi, abagadangwa kuwa kwamanani weentjalo nesikweledu.
Ama-Afrika Amerika amanengi nabasebenzi abangenamakghono.
Amabubulo akadeni njengamalahle nezokweluka.

slides.notes: Isilayidi le yongeza umehluko oqakathekileko: ii-'Roaring Twenties' azange zibhodle emntwini woke. Ukukhiqiza okungapheliko kwezokulima kwagandelela amanani wamaplasi phasi isikhathi soke, kwatjhiya abalimi besikweledwini phambi kuka-1929. Ubunjinga baba ngokungalingani khulu, ngalokho ukudingeka kweempahla bekuthembele eqenjini elincani nesikweledu. Le izobelezo yesakhiwo isiza ukuchaza bona kubayini ukuwohloka kwamasheya kungagirizela umnotho woke ku-Depression.

slides.title: Ukusuka ekukhuleni ukuya ekuwohlokeni, 1913-1938

blocks.alt: Ilayini yesikhathi yezehlakalo eziqakathekileko kusukela emudwaneni wokuhlanganisa kaFord ngo-1913 ukuya eNew Deal yakamva ngo-1938.

events.label: INew Deal yesibili: iSocial Security, iWagner Act

slides.notes: Sebenzisa ilayini yesikhathi bona uhlanganise umumo wendaba phambi kweensilayidi ezineminingwana zokuwohloka nokululama: ukukhula okude, ukuwohloka okumasinyana, i-depression ejulako, bese kutjhentjho lezepolitiki (uRoosevelt) elaletha ukungenelela kwakarhulumende. Buza abafundi bona batjheje bona ithemba latjhentjhela msinya njani ku-crisis - hlangana neminyaka elitjhumi yokukhula yaphelela emavekeni ambalwa.

slides.title: Ukuwohloka kwe-Wall Street
slides.lead: Ngasekupheleni kukaMfumfu 1929 amanani wamasheya awohloka, aqeda umnotho phakathi kobusuku obunye.

blocks.text: Ithemba lawohloka batjali-mali barhaba ukuthengisa phambi kokobana amanani ehla ngokungeziweko. Nge-**Black Thursday (24 Mfumfu 1929)** khulukhulu **nge-Black Tuesday (29 Mfumfu 1929)**, iingidi zamasheya zathululwa besele amanani awohloka. Abathengi be-margin abazange bakwazi ukubhadela imali abayibolekileko, begodu amabhange abewaboleke imali athoma ukuwa.

items: Ivelo yamasheya yawohloka khulu bekwanengi asele angasilitho.
Ukuthengisa ngokusaba kwazitjhaya kwabo njengombana woke umuntu alinga ukuphuma ngesikhathi sinye.
Ukuwohloka kwatjhabalalisa iimali ebekagcinelwe, isikweledu nethemba emnothweni woke.

media.alt: Umudwa wechati owehla ngokutjhisako uwela ngeliwa.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 160' role='img'><rect width='240' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><line x1='30' y1='20' x2='30' y2='134' stroke='#333' stroke-width='2'/><line x1='30' y1='134' x2='214' y2='134' stroke='#333' stroke-width='2'/><polyline points='40,44 78,36 108,42 132,40 150,70 168,104 190,126' fill='none' stroke='#8a1f1f' stroke-width='5' stroke-linecap='round' stroke-linejoin='round'/><circle cx='190' cy='126' r='6' fill='#5c1414'/></svg>

slides.notes: Yenza kucaciseke bona ukuwohloka bekuyisitjhukumiso, ingasi imbangela yodwa ye-Depression. Kwaveza kwakhulisa iinzobelezo ezingaphasi: ukukhiqiza okungapheliko, ubunjinga obungalinganiko, ukuqagela okunganakekeliko namabhange abuthakathaka. Chaza umphumela we-domino - amasheya awohlokako aqeda abathengi be-margin, abangazange bakwazi ukubhadela amabhange, ngemva kwalokho awohloka, aqeda abagcini-mali abavamileko abanganasibopho nemakethe yamasheya.

slides.title: I-Great Depression
slides.lead: Ukuwohloka kwagirizela ku-crisis yomnotho ejule khulu emlandweni wamva.

blocks.text: Njengombana amabhange awohloka nethemba lanyamalala, ukuthenga koma. Iimfeketri zanciphisa umkhiqizo zaqothela abasebenzi; abantu abangasebenziko abazange bakwazi ukuthenga iimphahla, ngalokho iimfeketri ezinengi zavalwa - ijikelezo elehlako. Ngo-1933 mhlamunye **umuntu munye kwabane basebenzi bamaMerika** bekangasebenzi, begodu iindawo zamatjhantji ezabizwa ngokobana zii-**'Hoovervilles'** zavela emadorobheni amanengi.

items: Iinkulungwana zamabhange zawohloka, zaqeda iimali yemindeni ebeyigcinelwe.
Amanani wamaplasi ehla khulu bekwanengi iintjalo zatjhiywa zibola ngesikhathi abantu balamba.
Imithelo ephakemeko ye-US nekurhweba okwehlako kwarhatjha i-Depression ephasini loke.

media.alt: Umudwa wabantu abalinde ngaphandle kwefeketri evaliweko.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 160' role='img'><rect width='240' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect x='120' y='36' width='104' height='84' fill='#dcd3c2'/><rect x='150' y='70' width='44' height='50' fill='#7a5a3a'/><g fill='#3a3a3a'><circle cx='30' cy='78' r='8'/><rect x='24' y='88' width='12' height='30'/><circle cx='52' cy='78' r='8'/><rect x='46' y='88' width='12' height='30'/><circle cx='74' cy='78' r='8'/><rect x='68' y='88' width='12' height='30'/><circle cx='96' cy='78' r='8'/><rect x='90' y='88' width='12' height='30'/></g><rect x='16' y='120' width='208' height='16' fill='#7a8b5a'/></svg>

slides.notes: Gandelela isilinganiso sabantu se-crisis nomkghwa we-deflationary spiral: ukungasebenzi kwanciphisa ukudingeka, okwanciphisa umkhiqizo, okwakhulisa ukungasebenzi. Chaza bona kubayini yaba yezephasi loke - i-USA beyisenhloko yokurhweba nezeemali zephasi, begodu imithelo ephakemeko kunye nokuwohloka kwe-US lending kwaqinisa eminye imnotho. Lo mzekelo oqakathekileko we-'crisis of capitalism'. Tjheja bona amanani aqaselwe begodu atjhentjha ngokweemthombo. [SME] Sibawa uqinisekise amanani wokungasebenzi nokuwohloka kwamabhange atjumbulukako we-CAPS.

slides.title: INew Deal: 'ama-Three Rs'
slides.lead: URoosevelt walahla i-laissez-faire wasebenzisa amandla wakarhulumende bona alwe ne-Depression.

blocks.heading: Isizo (Relief)
blocks.text: Isizo esiphuthumako kwabatlhagako nabangasebenziko - ukudla, iinkampi zomsebenzi nemisebenzi yomphakathi.

blocks.heading: Ukululama (Recovery)
blocks.text: Vusa imakghwa nezokulima ngokusebenzisa ukusetjenziswa kwemali, iimboleko nokusekelwa kwamanani.

blocks.heading: Ukubuyekeza (Reform)
blocks.text: Tjhentjha imithetho - lawula amabhange nemakethe yamasheya bona lokhu kungaphinde kwenzeke.

media.alt: Ukuxhawulana phambi kweenakhiwo zakarhulumende, okutjengisa isizo sombuso.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 160' role='img'><rect width='240' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect x='40' y='40' width='160' height='30' fill='#c8b89a'/><path d='M60 40 L120 16 L180 40 Z' fill='#b7a98d'/><g stroke='#f4efe6' stroke-width='6'><line x1='72' y1='50' x2='72' y2='70'/><line x1='120' y1='50' x2='120' y2='70'/><line x1='168' y1='50' x2='168' y2='70'/></g><g fill='#8a1f1f'><rect x='84' y='96' width='34' height='16' rx='8'/><rect x='122' y='96' width='34' height='16' rx='8'/></g><circle cx='120' cy='104' r='11' fill='#e8a13a'/></svg>

slides.notes: Chaza umbono omkhulu: uRoosevelt (owakhethwa ngo-1932, wafungiswa ngoNtaka 1933) wehlukana ne-laissez-faire begodu waphikelela bona urhulumende kufuze angenelele ngokusebenza bona asindise ikapitalizimu. Iinkulumo zakhe zomrhabulo ('fireside chats') zavuselela ithemba. Ama-'Three Rs' - Relief, Recovery, Reform - anikela abafundi isakhelo esikhanyako sokuhlola i-New Deal esilayidini elilandelako.

slides.title: Ama-'alphabet agencies' - neemphikiswano
slides.lead: Ilizi lama-ejensi amatjha wakarhulumende afaka i-New Deal emsebenzini - kodwana kwahlukanisa imibono.

blocks.text: Ku-'First Hundred Days' nangemva kwalokho, uRoosevelt wadala ama-ejensi aziwa ngamaletha wawo wokuthoma: i-**CCC** (imisebenzi yokulondeka kwemvelo), i-**TVA** (amadamu negezi), i-**AAA** (isizo sabalimi) ne-**WPA** (imisebenzi yomphakathi). I-**Social Security Act (1935)** yethula amapensheni nesekelo sokungasebenzi.
The only thing we have to fear is fear itself.

items: **Abagxeki abangesokudla** bathi kwanikela urhulumende amandla amanengi begodu kwadura khulu.
**Abagxeki abangesokhohlo** bathi kwenza okuncani khulu kwabatlhago khulu.
Inengi labalobi bomlando bayavumelana bona ukululama okupheleleko kweza kwaphela kunye nePi yePhasi yesiBili, kodwana i-New Deal yasindisa ikapitalizimu yabumba kabutjha umbuso.

slides.notes: Khuthaza ukuhlola okulinganiseleko - ikghono eliyihloko le-FET. I-New Deal yanciphisa ubuhlungu, yadala imisebenzi begodu yabuyisa ikholo ehlelweni, begodu ukubuyekezwa kwamabhange nemakethe yamasheya (njenge-bank deposit insurance nokulawula imakethe) kwahlala iminyaka eminengi. Kodwana ukungasebenzi kwahlala kuphakeme bekwafika ukusetjenziswa kwemali yepi, begodu i-Supreme Court yaqeda ezinye izinyathelo (i-NRA ngo-1935, i-AAA ngo-1936). Beka umphikiswano oyihloko: i-New Deal yakhamba khulu, namkha ayikhambanga ngokwaneleko?

slides.title: Indlela i-Depression eyafinyelela ngayo eSewula Afrika
slides.lead: Njengenarha erhwebako, ekhiqiza igolide, iSewula Afrika ayizange ikwazi ukubalekela i-crisis yephasi.

blocks.text: Ukwehla kokurhweba namanani wephasi kwagadanga iSewula Afrika kabuhlungu, begodu isomiso esimbi sajulisa ubuhlungu kubalimi. Urhulumende ekuthomeni wahlala ku-**gold standard**, okwagcina imali idurile begodu kwamburhisa i-slump, bekwafika lapha aphuma ku-gold standard ekupheleni kuka-**1932**. Intengo yegolide yakhuphuka, kwakhulisa iimayini begodu kwasiza umnotho bona ululame.

items: Abalimi abamhlophe nabanzima ngokufanako baqothelwa emhlabathini, kwarhabisa ukurholela emadorobheni.
Ukuphuma ku-gold standard kwavuselela imboni yeemayini yegolide eqakathekileko.
I-crisis yasiza ukusunduzela uHertzog noSmuts kurhulumende we-'Fusion' ka-1934.

media.alt: Isikwa segolide esihlanganiswe ngomtjhagalo negobolondo lephasi, okutjengisa ukurhweba kwephasi ngegolide.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 160' role='img'><rect width='240' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><circle cx='170' cy='80' r='40' fill='#7a8b5a'/><path d='M138 66 q20 -10 40 0 t40 0' fill='none' stroke='#f4efe6' stroke-width='3'/><path d='M136 94 q22 10 44 0' fill='none' stroke='#f4efe6' stroke-width='3'/><line x1='170' y1='40' x2='170' y2='120' stroke='#f4efe6' stroke-width='3'/><polygon points='40,96 96,96 108,72 52,72' fill='#e8a13a' stroke='#c88a1a' stroke-width='2'/><line x1='108' y1='84' x2='128' y2='84' stroke='#8a1f1f' stroke-width='4'/><polygon points='126,78 138,84 126,90' fill='#8a1f1f'/></svg>

slides.notes: Hlanganisa isihloko lesi somlando wephasi nenarha yabafundi. I-Depression mzekelo oqinileko wokuthembelana komnotho wephasi. Gcina izinga lifaneleke: imibono eyihloko kukobana iSewula Afrika yatlhaga ngokwehla kokurhweba nesomiso, nokobana ukulahla i-gold standard ekupheleni kuka-1932 kwakhuphula intengo yegolide kwasiza ukululama, okwafaka ezepolitiki zakarhulumende we-Fusion ka-1934. [SME] Sibawa uqinisekise bona iminingwana engangani yomnotho nezepolitiki zeSewula Afrika esihloko se-CAPS esilindele lapha.

slides.title: Esikufundileko - nemibuzo yokubuyekeza
slides.lead: IKapitalizimu yatjhukumisa ukukhula okurarako, yaveza ukuwohloka okutjhabalalisako, begodu yabunjwa kabutjha kukungenelela kwakarhulumende.

blocks.text: Ukukhula kwemakethe ekhululekileko kwe-USA kweminyaka yee-1920s bekusekelwe ekwenzeni ngobunengi, isikweledu nethemba, kodwana godu nokungalingani nokuqagela okunganakekeliko. Ukuwohloka kwango-1929 kwatjhukumisa i-Great Depression, begodu i-New Deal kaRoosevelt yatjhentjha i-**laissez-faire** epheleleko yayenza urhulumende osebenzako - itjhugululo endleleni imibuso yamva elawula ngayo umnotho wayo.

blocks.question: Chaza ukuthi ukwenza ngobunengi nesikweledu esilula kwasiza njani ukubanga kokubili ukukhula nokuwohloka kweminyaka yee-1920s.
Kubayini ukuwohloka kwe-Wall Street kwango-1929 kwarholela ku-Great Depression? Sebenzisa okungenani iimbangela ezintathu.
'I-New Deal yasindisa ikapitalizimu yamaMerika.' Uyavumelana? Nikela iimbangela ezisekelako nezingasekeliko.

slides.notes: Phetha ngokubuyela embuzweni omkhulu wesahluko: yini amandla neenzobelezo zekapitalizimu njengehlelo lomnotho? Imibuzo emithathu ilingisa iindlela ze-CAPS ezisekelwe eemthonjeni nokutlola okwandisiweko, ngokwabelwa kwamamaki okukhuphukako ngobudisi. Khuthaza iimpikiswano elinganiseleko, esekelwe ebufakazini embuzweni wokugcina ohlobene ne-ese. Isihloko lesi sihlobana godu nangaphambili ne-'crisis of capitalism' eyondla ukukhula kwe-fascism ne-Nazism.
